message:
fix: resolve CI warnings-as-errors and OpenSSL cross-compilation failure

- Remove unreachable catch-all match arms on LockError (only has
  Cancelled and Poisoned variants) in embed, rerank, and lexical crates
- Remove unused fetch_queue_depth import in storage pipeline
- Add vendored-openssl feature to fsfs crate for static OpenSSL linking
- Enable vendored-openssl in CI for musl/zigbuild cross-compilation targets

These warnings became errors under -D warnings in CI, and the OpenSSL
issue blocked all musl release builds from producing binaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -507,10 +507,14 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
           target="${{ matrix.target }}"
+          extra_features=""
+          if [[ "${target}" == *"-musl"* ]] || [[ "${{ matrix.build_tool }}" == "zigbuild" ]]; then
+            extra_features="--features vendored-openssl"
+          fi
           if [[ "${{ matrix.build_tool }}" == "zigbuild" ]]; then
-            cargo zigbuild -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}"
+            cargo zigbuild -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" ${extra_features}
           else
-            cargo build -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}"
+            cargo build -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" ${extra_features}
           fi
 
       - name: Package archive + checksum
@@ -692,10 +696,14 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
           target="${{ matrix.target }}"
+          extra_features=""
+          if [[ "${target}" == *"-musl"* ]] || [[ "${{ matrix.build_tool }}" == "zigbuild" ]]; then
+            extra_features="--features vendored-openssl"
+          fi
           if [[ "${{ matrix.build_tool }}" == "zigbuild" ]]; then
-            cargo zigbuild -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features
+            cargo zigbuild -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features ${extra_features}
           else
-            cargo build -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features
+            cargo build -p frankensearch-fsfs --release --target "${target}" --no-default-features ${extra_features}
           fi
 
       - name: Package lite archive + checksum
